product_overview: A lightweight social feed built with Laravel 12 and Vue 3 for practicing common authentication, profile management, and posting workflows. Authenticated users can create posts, filter their feed, and manage account settings including password and appearance.
core_goals: Create a new user account and sign in
Authenticate and sign out of the app
Create short posts and view a global feed
Filter the feed to show only the user's posts
Update profile information and delete the account with confirmation
Change account password from within the app
Switch the application theme between light, dark, and system modes

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow a visitor to create a new account with name, email, and password and land on the authenticated dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password input field -> Submit registration form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Provide invalid or incomplete fields (e.g. invalid email or mismatched passwords) -> Submit registration form -> See validation errors and remain on /register

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate an existing user with email and password to access the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Optionally enable Remember Me -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with incorrect credentials -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See invalid credentials error

features.name: Post Feed (Dashboard)
features.description: Authenticated users view a global feed of posts and can create new posts; users can filter the feed to show only their own posts.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /dashboard -> View list of all posts from all users -> Type a new post -> Submit new post -> See the new post appear at the top of the feed
Authenticate and navigate to /dashboard -> View list of all posts -> Select My Posts filter -> See feed updated to show only own posts -> Select All filter -> See full feed restored

features.name: Logout
features.description: End the authenticated session and return to the public site.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /dashboard -> Open account menu -> Choose Log out -> See the public home page or login page

features.name: Profile Settings
features.description: Update profile name and email; delete the account after confirming the current password.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /settings/profile -> Update name field -> Update email field -> Submit profile changes -> See success flash message
Authenticate and navigate to /settings/profile -> Initiate account deletion -> Enter current password to confirm deletion -> Confirm deletion -> See account removed and lose access to the dashboard

features.name: Password Settings
features.description: Change the current account password from within the app.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /settings/password -> Fill current password field -> Fill new password field -> Fill confirm new password field -> Submit password change -> See success flash message

Authenticate and navigate to /settings/password -> Fill current password field -> Fill new password and mismatching confirm field -> Submit password change -> See validation error about password confirmation

features.name: Appearance Settings
features.description: Switch application theme immediately between light, dark, and system preference.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /settings/appearance -> Select Light theme -> See the theme applied immediately
Authenticate and navigate to /settings/appearance -> Select Dark theme -> See the theme applied immediately
Authenticate and navigate to /settings/appearance -> Select System theme -> See the app follow the operating system preference immediately

routes.description: Authenticated feed of all posts; supports "My Posts" filter
User login form with optional Remember Me
Request a password reset link via email
Set a new password using a reset token
Update profile name and email; delete account

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow a visitor to create a new account with name, email, and password
user_interactions: Fill name input field
Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Fill confirm password input field
Click Register button to submit
See dashboard on success or validation errors on failure

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate an existing user with email and password
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Optionally check Remember Me checkbox
Click Log in button
See dashboard on success or error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Request a password reset link via email
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Click "Email password reset link" button
See confirmation message that the link was sent

features.name: Post Feed (Dashboard)
features.description: Authenticated users view a global feed of posts and can create new ones
user_interactions: View list of all posts from all users
Type a new post in the textarea
Click Post button to submit
See the new post appear at the top of the feed
Click "My Posts" filter tab to show only own posts
Click "All" tab to return to the full feed

features.name: Logout
features.description: End the authenticated session and redirect to the public site
user_interactions: Click user avatar / name in the sidebar footer
Click "Log out" in the dropdown menu
See the public home page (or login page)

features.name: Profile Settings
features.description: Update profile name and email; delete account with password confirmation
user_interactions: Update name field
Update email field
Click Save button and see success flash message
Click Delete Account button
Enter current password in confirmation dialog
Confirm deletion and lose access to the dashboard

features.name: Password Settings
user_interactions: Fill current password field
Fill new password field
Fill confirm new password field
Click Save button and see success flash message

features.name: Appearance Settings
features.description: Switch application theme between light, dark, and system
user_interactions: Click Light tab to apply light theme
Click Dark tab to apply dark theme
Click System tab to follow OS preference
See the theme change applied immediately

known_limitations.issue: No pagination on the post feed; all posts are loaded at once
known_limitations.impact: Performance degrades as post count grows

known_limitations.issue: Friend request and friend accept routes are commented out
known_limitations.impact: Friend-related features (friends feed filter) are not functional

known_limitations.issue: Public profile and status routes are commented out
